properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Long ago we spoke our vows to heaven Long ago we promise we endure Though the years have grown us older And many things have changed There's one thing for certain Our love will stay the same

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For richer, for poorer; for better or worse In health and in sickness you are mine and I am yours Together, forever, no matter what we face Trusting in his mercy and his grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No one else could bring me joy like you do No one else could love me quite like you The storms came in, the winds blew strong And they said we'd never last But the Lord himself was our right hand And the rains they soon did pass

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If I had it all to do over I'll choose you again. I promise you my love I'll be with you till the very end
